testcase.name: handleException_doesNotExposeInternalDetail
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-06T10:50:12.769+08:00 ERROR 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Unhandled exception
java.lang.RuntimeException: internal detail that should not leak at testcase.name: handleResponseStatus_withReason_reasonAppearsInDetail
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:12.805+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : ResponseStatusException [503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE]: maintenance

testcase.name: handleMissingParam_returns400WithParameterName
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:12.825+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Missing request parameter: Required request parameter 'page' for method parameter type Integer is not present

testcase.name: handleResponseStatus_preservesOriginalStatus
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:12.833+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : ResponseStatusException [429 TOO_MANY_REQUESTS]: rate limit exceeded

testcase.name: handleUnreadable_returns400WithValidationErrorCode
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:12.975+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Unreadable request body: Bad JSON

testcase.name: handleBusiness_returnsCorrectStatusAndErrorCode
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:12.978+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Business exception [20005] 查無使用者

testcase.name: handleBusiness_withDetail_populatesErrorDetail
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:12.987+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Business exception [20005] 查無使用者: userId=42

testcase.name: handleConstraintViolation_returns400WithViolationDetail
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:13.217+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Constraint violation: pageSize: must be greater than 0

testcase.name: handleBusiness_withoutDetail_errorDetailIsNull
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-06T10:50:13.223+08:00 WARN 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Business exception [30003] 角色不存在

testcase.name: handleException_returns500WithUnknownErrorCode
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-06T10:50:13.228+08:00 ERROR 92355 --- [taipei-iot] [ main] c.t.i.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Unhandled exception
